title: Perplexity frames deep research as iterative search, reasoning, and export
claim: Perplexity describes Deep Research as a multi-minute workflow that iteratively searches, reads, reasons, writes a report, and then exports or shares the result.
source_snippet: The workflow searches, reads documents, refines its plan, and produces an exportable report.
implication: ProductOS should treat iterative planning and export-ready deliverables as baseline expectations for auto-research.
followup_questions: Which ProductOS research outputs should export into docs or presentations automatically after review?
